programme.title: Truck Turner
programme.desc: The great Isaac Hayes stars in this powerful, pull-out-the-stops crime thriller that pulsates with high-octane energy and nonstop suspense as Truck Turner tracks a sadistic pimp through the mean streets of Los Angeles. Nichelle Nichols also stars.

programme.title: Black Caesar
programme.desc: The brutal assault at the hands of a racist cop will inform the life of Tommy Gibbs (Fred Williamson, "Hammer"), who will grow up to become the reigning head of Harlem�s black mafia in "Black Caesar."

programme.title: Gang Related
programme.desc: Two killers are hiding where no one will ever find them...behind their badges! Tupac Shakur and James Belushi are two corrupt police detectives caught in a dangerous web of deceit in this gritty, smart and tough action thriller.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: In New York of the 1920s, the black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. Three rival gang leaders (Laurence Fishhburne, Tim Roth and Andy Garcia) battle for control of Harlem's urban power.

programme.title: Mulholland Falls
programme.desc: In the 1950s, an elite squad of detectives becomes embroiled in a conspiracy and faces a secret the U.S. government is determined to keep hidden.

programme.title: Dillinger
programme.desc: Starring Warren Oates, Ben Johnson, Cloris Leachman and Richard Dreyfuss, this electrifying crime saga about one of the most notorious gangsters of the 1930's sets the screen ablaze with explosive shootouts, daring escapes and stellar performances.

programme.title: Invasion U.S.A.
programme.desc: An army of terrorist mercenaries led by Soviet agent Rostov (Richard Lynch) catches America unprepared and makes it into a war zone. Only one man can stem the rising tide of violence: retired agent and martial arts expert Matt Hunter (Chuck Norris).

programme.title: Lone Wolf Mcquade
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is Lone Wolf McQuade, a Texas Ranger feared by outlaws and respected by other lawmen. When McQuade uncovers a gun smuggling operation, the action explodes, with McQuade wreaking havoc on all those who come between him and the law.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Death Warrant
programme.desc: Superstar Jean-Claude Van Damme is Louis Burke, an undercover detective who is investigating a series of murders at a penitentiary. But when he unearths a shocking secret, he must attempt a daring escape that pits him against an enemy from his past!

programme.title: Double Impact
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme leaps into dual roles of Chad and Alex Wagner, twin brothers separated after their parents’ brutal murder. Twenty-five years later, fate reunites them and ignites their determination to exact revenge... with two times the pain.

programme.title: Bloodsport
programme.desc: In the role that kicked his international career into high gear, Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as Frank Dux, a man who refuses to lose and who might just win himself a place in history as he competes in a full-contact world championship competition.

programme.title: RoboCop
programme.desc: Classic sci-fi adventure about a cop...part man...part machine...the future of law enforcement.
